description: SEC Regulation D private-placement compliance for investor subscriptions: 506(c) offerings require verified accreditation, 506(b) offerings prohibit general solicitation, pending verifications are routed to compliance, and every clean subscription carries an accreditation score.
name: Regulation D Offering Compliance

entities.description: An investor's subscription to a private offering under a Reg D exemption.

events.description: The subscription cannot proceed until compliance completes accreditation verification.

rules.name: 506(c) requires verified accreditation
rules.description: Rule 506(c) permits general solicitation only when every purchaser's accredited status is verified through reasonable steps — self-certification is not sufficient.
rules.reasonTemplate: Subscription of {amount} by investor {investorId} to offering {offeringId} rejected: Rule 506(c) requires verified accreditation; '{accreditationStatus}' via '{verificationMethod}' does not satisfy the reasonable-steps standard.

rules.name: 506(b) prohibits general solicitation
rules.description: An offering relying on Rule 506(b) loses its exemption if investors were reached through general solicitation or advertising.
rules.reasonTemplate: Subscription by investor {investorId} to 506(b) offering {offeringId} rejected: the investor was reached via general solicitation, which is prohibited under Rule 506(b).

rules.name: Route pending accreditations to compliance
rules.description: A subscription whose accreditation is still pending waits for compliance — it is neither accepted nor rejected automatically.
rules.reasonTemplate: Accreditation of investor {investorId} for offering {offeringId} ({amount}) is pending verification via '{verificationMethod}'; compliance review required before acceptance.

rules.name: Accept verified subscriptions
rules.description: Verified accredited investors subscribe cleanly; the accreditation enters the score fabric per offering.
rules.reasonTemplate: Subscription of {amount} by verified accredited investor {investorId} to offering {offeringId} accepted under {exemptionRule} (verification: {verificationMethod}).

capabilities.name: Private Offering Compliance
capabilities.description: Reg D exemption enforcement across investor subscriptions.

workflows.name: Accreditation verification queue
workflows.description: Pending accreditations become compliance tasks so no subscription waits silently.

steps.template: Verify accreditation of investor {investorId} for offering {offeringId} ({amount})
